- Question 2: "Is Mogul east of Fortuna?" → Yes

Thus, the only logically consistent answers must be opposite: one Yes, one No. There is no interpretation under which both questions could be answered the same way (e.g., both Yes or both No) without contradicting the directional relationship between the two cities.

Therefore, the questions are logically CONSISTENT: answering both the same way always leads to a contradiction.
